top_signals.title: Bessent Says US Could Do Country-Specific Waiver for Russian Oil - Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: Bessent Says US Could Do Country-Specific Waiver for Russian Oil  Bloomberg
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US Futures, Korean Stocks Drop
top_signals.summary: Korean stocks are pulling back from record highs as Broadcom Inc.’s outlook for AI-chip sales fell short of elevated expectations, pausing a blistering advance in semiconductor shares. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens breaks down the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HSBC, AIA Slump After Report of HK Bank Account Curbs
top_signals.summary: HSBC Holdings Plc and AIA Group Ltd. shares fell after a media report said some banks have suspended opening Hong Kong bank accounts for clients in mainland China that could be used for overseas investments. Bloomberg's Stephen Engle has the context. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jan de Nul Wins Contract to Dig Argentina’s $10 Billion Waterway
top_signals.summary: Belgian dredger Jan de Nul NV and local partner Servimagnus SA won a 25-year contract on Thursday from Argentina’s government to upgrade the nation’s chief trade route in a concession overshadowed by accusations of Chinese influence.

top_signals.title: China speeds past Japan in car exports to Australia on EV bonanza
top_signals.summary: Almost 36,000 passenger cars from China arrived in Australia in April, according to government data, well ahead of the 29,000 from Japan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ’Embryonic spines’: Trump faces growing Republican pushback
top_signals.summary: Republicans worry that his focus on pet projects — like an Ultimate Fighting Championship bout at the White House — make him look out of touch.

top_signals.title: Axiom Space boosts funding to $525 million with MUFG Bank as new investor
top_signals.summary: The startup is among several firms competing to build a commercial replacement to the International Space Station, which is set to be decommissioned by 2030.
